/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/zepra-browser.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/zepra-browser.dir/examples/zepra_window_demo.cpp.o" -o /home/swana/Documents/zeprabrowser/source/bin/zepra-browser   -L/home/swana/Documents/zeprabrowser/source/zepraEngine/../webCore/build  -L/home/swana/Documents/zeprabrowser/source/zepraEngine/../zepraScript/build/lib  -L/home/swana/Documents/zeprabrowser/source/zepraEngine/../networking/build  -Wl,-rpath,/home/swana/Documents/zeprabrowser/source/zepraEngine/../webCore/build:/home/swana/Documents/zeprabrowser/source/zepraEngine/../zepraScript/build/lib:/home/swana/Documents/zeprabrowser/source/zepraEngine/../networking/build -lSDL2
